title: Custom Videogames Music Discs
description: Replaces Minecraft Jukebox songs with music from other Videogames
body:
> _**Hi! I'm Luca, but you can call me El Pigeon.
> This is my first project, so please don't criticize me...**_
> 
> In this Resource Pack, your boring Minecraft Music Disks will become very enjoyable, because they've been replaced by very famous and BEAUTIFUL songs.

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- “13” -> Super Mario Odyssey: [Bubblaine](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=oG8txbgWP20&list=RDoG8txbgWP20&start_radio=1)
- “cat” -> Persona 5: [The Days When My Mother Was There](https://youtu.be/it5wuAgf1Pw?si=XpfZ6sM2f8yXII2x)
- “blocks” -> Persona 4: [Pursuing My True Self](https://youtu.be/tiNAuVhBGd0?si=k4MfsUJI57-PKIvb)
- “chirp” -> Omori: [Splintered Sweets In The Castle, Prelude](https://youtu.be/HLHvRifRS9U?si=CL6I5FdQyuyKCvXL)
- “relic” -> Kirby Dream Land: [Theme](https://youtu.be/3CS93CdMv_E?si=8tX5TMBYCa93OBsO) 
- “far” -> Outer Wilds: [Timber Hearth](https://youtu.be/SPa8bPqQfmo?si=Kipfe5o1Qx0zEkvJ)
- “mall” -> Before Your Eyes: [Stay Here](https://youtu.be/poXS1r7gaIU?si=pARIy--fG6FrsgxC)
- “mellohi” -> Made in Abyss: [Pathway](https://youtu.be/Mc53HpO685k?si=e8g7TnH8B2oJv3pr)
- “stal” -> Terraria: [Overworld Day](https://youtu.be/x23I8f9PwlI?si=3WN6Ye9EmZXRLQ8_)
- “strad” -> Yoshi's Story: [The Start of Yoshi's Story Theme](https://youtu.be/nghTrcPBp3s?si=Yy5xLHFpqofGrGPM)
- “ward” -> Angry Birds: [Original Theme Song](https://youtu.be/DehK_Y0TUbE?si=h94GX6xjXQKEXaVo)
- “11” -> Sonic R: [Can You Feel The Sunshine?](https://youtu.be/XWoekUxnZ7w?si=yrvSzwvLIA4Flp_m)
- “wait” -> Plants vs Zombies: [Main Menu](https://youtu.be/4w3VqzwJ1j4?si=89Sg30FZcxB_fH7p)
- “pigstep” -> Ultrakill: [Take Care](https://youtu.be/fI2u6mSd62s?si=jzpVudvPsFf2nNcY)
- “otherside” -> Nintendo: [Wii Shop Channel](https://youtu.be/yyjUmv1gJEg?si=gbmfOYZr5Pg2pHhW)
- “5” -> Animal Crossing New Horizons: [K.K Jazz](https://youtu.be/ZH33m9jfwyg?si=TSqgdExdFu-qwikI)
- “creator” -> A Minecraft Movie: [Steve’s Lava Chicken](https://youtu.be/41O_MydqxTU?si=CfVaeR0toEqsKX2e)
- “creator (music box)” -> Celeste: [Firsts Steps](https://youtu.be/N8OHSXvneOE?si=dniHoYH3jb1HHHCz)
- “precipice” -> Deltarune Chapter 1: [Hip Shop](https://youtu.be/D83BxptHcRc?si=XNaQYFxCbxTl8FVT)
- “tears” -> Nintendo: [DSi Shop](https://youtu.be/krISRDj6_2w?si=yMs-WrG-vIj4bPp7)
- “lava chicken” -> Hollow Knight: [Dirtmouth](https://youtu.be/NSlkW1fFkyo?si=b5xkOCAq4ttq-k50)


</details>

**Probably when you add your Resource Pack in the game you will see that it is _RED_ and therefore you will think that it is Incompatible.
But in Truth it is Compatible with all discs from 1.21.7 and Above!**

> I also thank you so much: [@darkcows9](https://modrinth.com/user/darkcows9) [@maumeethan](https://modrinth.com/user/maumeethan) they inspired me a lot❤️
